text: Israel-UAR: Israel's dispute with the UAR over dredging work in the Jordan River within the Israeli-Syrian demilitarized zone probably will soon become acute again. The UN chairman
token_text: israel-uar israel's dispute with the uar over dredging work in the jordan river within the israeli-syrian demilitarized zone probably will soon become acute again the un chairman

text:
of the Mixed Armistice Commission has issued a finding which will permit the Israelis to proceed with dredging operations scheduled to begin during the first week in October.

The UAR, despite a feeling "our legal objections are weak," may lodge a protest with the armistice commission, but UAR Commander in Chief Amir has forbidden use of the armed forces to prevent the work because of "the international political situation."
(Page 2)

Republic of the Congo: Anti-Lumumba elements continue efforts to forestall any attempted countercoup by Lumumba in connection with the proposed political round-table conference in Leopoldville. In conversation with Ambassador Timberlake, Mobutu on 30 September expressed faith in the conference as a means of resolving the Congo's political ills, and stated that he would "impose his will" on the conferees if necessary. Ambassador Timberlake characterized Mobutu as extremely nervous and fearful of assassination.

Lumumba on 27 September asked that Cairo provide him with arms for ten to fifteen thousand soldiers, together with aircraft and helicopters.
concern on the part of the UAR, Ghana, and Guinea that the rotation of Ghanaian and UAR units from Leopoldville to the Congo interior--as ordered by the UN command--will make it difficult for them to support Lumumba
